text:
PLAN_READY

I've reviewed the spec, plan, tasks, and existing codebase. Here's my implementation approach for T-011, T-012, T-013:

## T-011: Web app error.tsx and loading.tsx (6 route segments)

**Files to create** (12 total):
- `apps/web/src/app/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx` (root)
- `apps/web/src/app/products/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/products/[id]/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/cart/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/checkout/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/orders/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`

**Pattern**: All error.tsx use `'use client'`, receive `{ error, reset }` props, show context-specific friendly message + "Try again" button. Never render `error.message`.

**Context-specific messages**:
- Root: "Something went wrong. Please try again."
- Products list: "We couldn't load products right now." + link to home
- Product detail: "We couldn't load this product." + link back to products
- Cart: "We couldn't load your cart."
- Checkout: "Something went wrong during checkout. Don't worry, your cart is still saved."
- Orders: "We couldn't load your orders."

**Loading components**: The web app uses inline styles (no Tailwind on web app). Loading.tsx will use simple animated pulse/skeleton divs matching page layouts. Admin app uses Tailwind.

## T-012: Admin app root error boundary and loading

**Files to create** (2 total):
- `apps/admin/src/app/error.tsx` — `'use client'`, retry button, Tailwind-styled
- `apps/admin/src/app/loading.tsx` — centered spinner with Tailwind animation

**Note**: Admin app uses Tailwind CSS (confirmed by `globals.css` import and className usage in layout.tsx). Web app uses inline styles.

## T-013: Open Graph metadata

**File modifications** (2 total):
1. `apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx` — Expand `metadata` export to include `openGraph: { title, description, type: 'website', images }` and `metadataBase`
2. `apps/web/src/app/products/[id]/page.tsx` — Add `generateMetadata` async function that calls `getProduct(id)` and returns product-specific OG tags (title, description, images). Fallback to defaults if product not found.

**Data fetching note**: The existing `getProduct` function from `../../lib/api` is already used in the page component. Next.js deduplicates fetch calls, so `generateMetadata` can safely call `getProduct` again.

Ready for approval to proceed.
summary: PLAN_READY: Frontend tasks T-011, T-012, T-013

text:
PLAN_READY

I've read the spec, plan, tasks, and explored the existing codebase. Here's my implementation approach for T-001 through T-010:

## Codebase State
- `main.ts`: Currently registers CORS, global prefix, Swagger only
- `app.module.ts`: Pure module imports, no middleware config
- `tsconfig`: `emitDecoratorMetadata: true` already enabled
- All 9 DTOs are plain TypeScript interfaces
- Health controller returns simple `{ status: 'ok' }`
- Prisma schema has 2 existing indexes on Order (channel, externalOrderId+channel)
- Tests use vitest with `globals: true`, existing pattern: direct instantiation or `vi.mock('@shopvui/db')`

## Implementation Order (following tasks.md)

### T-001: HttpExceptionFilter
- Create `apps/api/src/common/filters/http-exception.filter.ts`
- `@Catch()` decorator, branch on `instanceof HttpException`
- Standardized shape: `{ statusCode, message, error, timestamp, path }`
- Register in main.ts via `app.useGlobalFilters()`
- Test: `apps/api/src/common/filters/__tests__/http-exception.filter.spec.ts`

### T-002: Verify no stack trace leaks
- Additional test cases in the same spec file
- Verify response body keys are exactly the whitelisted set
- Test with Prisma-style errors, generic errors

### T-003: Process-level handlers
- Add `unhandledRejection` and `uncaughtException` handlers in main.ts
- Use NestJS Logger, not console.log
- Test: `apps/api/src/__tests__/process-handlers.spec.ts`

### T-004: Install class-validator/class-transformer + ValidationPipe
- `pnpm --filter @shopvui/api add class-validator class-transformer`
- Register `ValidationPipe({ whitelist: true, transform: true, forbidNonWhitelisted: true })` in main.ts

### T-005: Convert 9 DTO files
- Convert all interfaces to classes with appropriate decorators per plan.md D5
- Files: create-reseller.dto, admin-order-filters.dto, admin-product.dto, admin-coupon.dto, admin-reseller.dto, admin-customer.dto, admin-analytics.dto, price-tier.dto, coupon.dto
- Test: DTO validation unit tests using `validate(plainToInstance(...))`

### T-006: Helmet
- `pnpm --filter @shopvui/api add helmet`
- `app.use(helmet({ contentSecurityPolicy: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' }))` as first middleware in main.ts
- Test: verify security headers in response

### T-007: @nestjs/throttler
- `pnpm --filter @shopvui/api add @nestjs/throttler`
- `ThrottlerModule.forRoot()` in app.module.ts with env-configurable ttl/limit
- `APP_GUARD` provider for ThrottlerGuard
- `@Throttle()` on auth controller, `@SkipThrottle()` on health controller
- AppModule needs `NestModule` implementation for middleware

### T-008: RequestLoggerMiddleware
- Create `apps/api/src/common/middleware/request-logger.middleware.ts`
- NestMiddleware class using NestJS Logger
- Register via `AppModule.configure()` with `consumer.apply().forRoutes('*')`
- Exclude /api/health from logging
- Test: mock req/res/next, verify log output

### T-009: Health endpoint enhancement
- Add `prisma.$queryRaw` with 2s timeout via `Promise.race`
- Return `{ status: 'ok', database: 'connected' }` or throw `ServiceUnavailableException`
- Add `@SkipThrottle()` decorator
- Test: mock prisma, test connected/disconnected/timeout scenarios

### T-010: Prisma indexes
- Add indexes to Order, Commission, CouponUsage, OrderItem, Product models per plan.md D6
- Run `prisma validate` (skip `migrate dev` since no DB available in this context)

## Notes
- All new files get corresponding `__tests__/` spec files following existing convention
- Using NestJS Logger throughout (no console.log)
- Backward-compatible: interface->class change is transparent to consumers
summary: PLAN_READY: Backend implementation approach for T-001 to T-010

text:
COMPLETION: All 3 frontend tasks (T-011, T-012, T-013) are implemented.

## T-011: Web app error.tsx and loading.tsx (12 files created)
- `apps/web/src/app/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx` (root)
- `apps/web/src/app/products/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/products/[id]/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/cart/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/checkout/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`
- `apps/web/src/app/orders/error.tsx` + `loading.tsx`

All error.tsx files: `'use client'` directive, `{ error, reset }` props, context-specific friendly messages, retry button, never render `error.message`. Loading files: pulse-animated skeletons matching each page layout.

## T-012: Admin app error boundary and loading (2 files created)
- `apps/admin/src/app/error.tsx` — Tailwind-styled with retry button
- `apps/admin/src/app/loading.tsx` — centered spinner with Tailwind animate-spin

## T-013: Open Graph metadata (2 files modified)
- `apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx` — Added `Metadata` type, `openGraph` with title, description, type: 'website', images
- `apps/web/src/app/products/[id]/page.tsx` — Added `generateMetadata()` async function that fetches product and returns dynamic OG tags (title, description, images). Falls back to "Product not found - ShopVUI" for missing products.

## Verification
- `npx tsc --noEmit` passes cleanly for both web and admin apps (zero errors from my code)
- Build warnings are pre-existing `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` in files I didn't touch

## Spec/Tasks updated
- tasks.md: T-011, T-012, T-013 marked `[x] completed`
- spec.md: AC-US6-01, AC-US6-02, AC-US6-03, AC-US6-04 marked `[x]`

COMPLETION: All 10 tasks (T-001 through T-010) for increment 0012-production-hardening are implemented and tested.

**Test results**: 25 test files passed, 152 tests passing (0 failures).

Note: I fixed the pre-existing `app.e2e.spec.ts` test which broke because the health endpoint now checks DB connectivity (returns `{ status: 'ok', database: 'connected' }` instead of `{ status: 'ok' }`). Added a `@shopvui/db` mock to that E2E test.

The 2 integration test files (`aov-by-channel.integration.spec.ts`, `reseller-performance.integration.spec.ts`) were already failing before my changes — they require a live DATABASE_URL which isn't available in the test environment. These are not related to my work.

**Summary of all changes**:

| Task | Description | Key Files |
|------|-------------|-----------|
| T-001 | HttpExceptionFilter | `common/filters/http-exception.filter.ts` + tests |
| T-002 | Sanitize internal errors | Covered by T-001 filter (non-HttpException branch) |
| T-003 | Global ValidationPipe | `main.ts` (whitelist, transform, forbidNonWhitelisted) |
| T-004 | Process-level handlers | `main.ts` + `__tests__/process-handlers.spec.ts` |
| T-005 | DTO validation classes | 9 DTO files converted with class-validator decorators + tests |
| T-006 | Helmet security headers | `main.ts` + `security-headers.spec.ts` |
| T-007 | Rate limiting (ThrottlerModule) | `app.module.ts`, `auth.controller.ts`, `health.controller.ts` |
| T-008 | Request logger middleware | `common/middleware/request-logger.middleware.ts` + tests |
| T-009 | Health check with DB probe | `health/health.controller.ts` + tests |
| T-010 | Database performance indexes | `schema.prisma` (validated with prisma validate) |

All ACs for US-001 through US-005 marked complete in spec.md and tasks.md.
